name: Ubiquiti AI Key
title: Ubiquiti AI Key
short_description: Edge AI appliance for UniFi Protect with 1,800 smart detections/hour, Arm® Cortex®-A78AE processor, 16GB RAM, 256GB SSD, PoE++
description: Edge AI appliance for UniFi Protect with 1,800 smart detections/hour, Arm® Cortex®-A78AE processor, 16GB RAM, 256GB SSD, PoE++

detailed_description.heading: Edge AI Performance
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti AI Key (AI-Key) is a dedicated edge AI appliance designed to significantly enhance any UniFi Protect deployment with proactive, AI-driven threat detection and intelligent alerting. Operating directly within your network infrastructure, it delivers powerful local analytics without relying on external cloud processing. Engineered to analyze up to 1,800 smart detection events per hour, the AI Key expands the analytical capacity of connected UniFi cameras, enabling faster response times and more accurate threat identification. By processing events at the edge, it minimizes latency and reduces bandwidth consumption while maintaining enterprise-grade security standards. At its core, the device is powered by an Arm® Cortex®-A78AE v8.2 processor, paired with 16 GB LPDDR5 system memory, delivering high-throughput AI computation optimized for video analytics workloads.

detailed_description.heading: Integrated Storage and Connectivity
detailed_description.text: Integrated 256 GB SSD on-board storage ensures fast data access and reliable operation during intensive detection cycles. The unit connects via a GbE RJ45 port, providing stable and secure Ethernet-based management. A built-in 1.3" touchscreen LCM display allows quick status monitoring and system insights directly on the device, while a dedicated factory reset button ensures convenient maintenance. Designed for professional environments, the AI Key supports centralized management over Ethernet and seamlessly integrates into existing UniFi Protect ecosystems, transforming standard video surveillance into an intelligent, predictive security platform.

detailed_description.heading: Enterprise-Grade Hardware
detailed_description.text: Built for continuous operation in demanding environments, the AI Key features a durable aluminium alloy enclosure, providing effective thermal dissipation and structural strength. With compact dimensions of 134.2 × 131.2 × 33.7 mm and a weight of 635 g, it delivers high compute density in a space-efficient form factor suitable for rack shelves or structured wiring cabinets. The device operates within an ambient temperature range of -5 to 40°C, ensuring stable performance in server rooms, control centers, and enterprise networking environments. Integrated ESD/EMP protection rated at ±12kV air discharge and ±8kV contact discharge safeguards internal components against electrostatic and electromagnetic disturbances.

detailed_description.heading: Power and Efficiency
detailed_description.text: Power is supplied via PoE++ (50–57V supported voltage range), eliminating the need for a separate power adapter and simplifying deployment in structured Ethernet infrastructures. Despite its advanced processing capabilities, the appliance maintains a maximum power consumption of 45W, optimizing energy efficiency for continuous operation. The single GbE networking interface ensures reliable communication with the UniFi Protect system while maintaining secure data transmission. The hardware architecture is purpose-built for edge AI workloads, enabling sustained detection processing without compromising network stability. This combination of compact industrial design, enterprise-grade protection, and efficient PoE++ power delivery makes the AI Key a reliable backbone component for AI-enhanced surveillance deployments.

detailed_description.heading: Intelligent Event Processing
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti AI Key transforms traditional surveillance into a proactive threat detection system. By enhancing UniFi Protect environments with advanced AI-driven analytics, it enables real-time identification of potential risks before they escalate. With the ability to process up to 1,800 smart detections per hour, the appliance continuously evaluates events generated by connected cameras, refining alert accuracy and reducing false positives. This makes it particularly effective for high-traffic commercial environments, logistics centers, campuses, and critical infrastructure sites. Fully NDAA compliant and certified to FCC, IC, and CE standards, the AI Key meets regulatory requirements for enterprise and government deployments.

detailed_description.heading: Secure Management
detailed_description.text: The secure Ethernet-based management ensures streamlined configuration within professional network architectures. The integrated touchscreen provides at-a-glance system status visibility, while the high-speed SSD storage supports rapid indexing and efficient AI workload handling. The powerful Cortex-A78AE architecture enables advanced pattern recognition and sustained processing under continuous video analytics loads. By extending the intelligence of existing UniFi Protect systems without replacing current hardware, the AI Key represents a scalable and future-ready investment. It empowers organizations to move from passive video recording to intelligent, automated security operations driven by high-performance edge AI computing.
